description: instr 037: the cross-platform simulator in LOG mode (with noise) driven through the FR-40 wrap adapter. The wrap adapter runs `sim_worker --emit log --noise 3 --rate 2`, captures its stdout (interleaved work + noise lines) as the activity, and reaps COMPLETED from exit 0 -- proving the simulator's log/noise mode works end-to-end with a real adapter + the independent checker.
